channel.title: Fan Lyu (吕凡)
channel.description: Recent content on Fan Lyu (吕凡)

item.title: Krabby Patty recipe
item.description: Ingredients: For 4 people : Lots of love 2 cans of crab meat 1 lightly beaten egg 1/2 lemon juice Breadcrumbs 1 tomato Hamburger bread Pickles 1 onion 4 salad leaves Frying oil Salt pepper For the sauce: Worcestershire sauce Ketchup Mustard Steps : In a bowl, beat 1 egg then add the crabmeat, breadcrumbs, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Mix until you get a homogeneous consistency.

item.title: Fan Lyu (吕凡)
item.description: Personal Statement I’m a Postdoc Research Fellow in the New Laboratory of Pattern Recognition (NLPR), Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences (CASIA) supervised by Prof. Liang Wang . I achieved my PhD position supervised by Prof. Wei Fengin the College of Intelligence and Computing, Tianjin University (TJU). I was graduated from Suzhou University of Science and Technology as a master at 2018 advised by Prof. Fuyuan Hu. My major is Computer Application Technology, and my research focuses on Continual Learning and Computer Vision.

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2024 Jiayao Tan, Fan Lyu, Linyan Li, Fuyuan Hu, Tingliang Feng, Fenglei Xu, Zhang Zhang, Rui Yao, Liang Wang. Dynamic V2X Perception from Road-to-Vehicle Vision. IEEE TIV 2024. [pdf] [code] Ziqin Zhaoa, Fan Lyu, Linyan Li, Fuyuan Hu, Minming Gua, Li Sun. Towards Long-Term Remembering in Federated Continual Learning. Congnitive Compution 2024. [pdf] [code] Liqing Gao, Wei Feng, Fan Lyu, Liang Wan.
